# SnusFriend

> SnusFriend is a UK-based online shop specialising in nicotine pouches — smoke-free, tobacco-free nicotine products delivered across Europe.

## What We Sell

Nicotine pouches are small, white pouches placed under the upper lip. They deliver nicotine without tobacco, smoke, or vapour. SnusFriend stocks 500+ products across 40+ brands.

### Brands We Carry

Major brands include: VELO, ZYN, Sting, LOOP, Lyft, Skruf, White Fox, Pablo, Siberia, Ace, Killa, Thor, Helwit, Klint, Cuba, Shiro, VOLT, and many more.

### Product Categories

- **Strength levels**: Normal (4–8mg), Strong (8–12mg), Extra Strong (12–18mg), Ultra Strong (18mg+)
- **Flavours**: Mint, Berry, Citrus, Fruit, Coffee, Cola, Tobacco, and unflavoured
- **Formats**: Standard pouches, slim pouches, mini pouches, large pouches

### Pricing

Products are priced per can. Multi-can discounts available (3-pack, 5-pack, 10-pack). Free delivery on orders over €29.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://snusfriend.co.uk/
- All nicotine pouches: https://snusfriend.co.uk/nicotine-pouches
- Brands directory: https://snusfriend.co.uk/brands
- New arrivals: https://snusfriend.co.uk/nicotine-pouches?badge=new
- Bestsellers: https://snusfriend.co.uk/nicotine-pouches?badge=popular
- Special offers: https://snusfriend.co.uk/nicotine-pouches?badge=newPrice
- Membership (SnusPoints loyalty): https://snusfriend.co.uk/membership

## Loyalty Programme

SnusFriend operates a points system called **SnusPoints**. Customers earn 10 SnusPoints per €1 spent. Points can be redeemed for discounts.

## Delivery

- Free delivery on orders over €29
- Ships across the EU and UK
- Fulfilment via Nylogistik/Nyehandel

## Age Restriction

Nicotine products are only sold to adults aged 18+. SnusFriend requires age verification at checkout.

## Contact

- Email: support@snusfriend.com
- Website: https://snusfriend.co.uk

- https://snusfriend.co.uk/sitemap.xml
